observabilityAnomalyRules.description: Detects workers that stop reporting heartbeat signals while assigned work is still active.
recommendedActions: Check worker process health and shutdown/drain state.
Verify lease renewal and queue visibility timeout behavior.
Review poison work and abandonment signals for the same run.

observabilityAnomalyRules.description: Detects a sustained increase in failed migration work items for an active execution run.
recommendedActions: Inspect correlated structured logs for source/target API failures.
Review retry exhaustion and poison work classifications.
Pause admission if failures are caused by target throttling or invalid credentials.
